sources.title: AI Governance Market Size And Share — Industry Report, 2033
sources.claim: AI Governance market valued at $308.3M in 2025; projected to grow at 36.0% CAGR from 2026 to 2033, reaching $3.59B

sources.title: Global AI Regulations Fuel Billion-Dollar Market for AI Governance Platforms
sources.claim: Spending on AI governance platforms to reach $492M in 2026, surpassing $1B by 2030; February 17, 2026 press release

sources.publisher: EU Artificial Intelligence Act — Official Implementation Timeline
sources.title: EU AI Act Implementation Timeline — Key Compliance Dates
sources.claim: Prohibited AI practices enforceable Feb 2, 2025; GPAI model obligations Aug 2, 2025; high-risk AI obligations Aug 2, 2026; penalties up to €35M or 7% of global revenue

sources.title: AI Governance Market Report 2024–2029
sources.claim: AI Governance market $890M in 2024, growing at 45.3% CAGR to $5.78B by 2029

sources.title: AI Governance Market Funding Trends (2022–2026)
sources.claim: $691M raised across 47 AI governance funding deals from 2022–2025; Palo Alto Networks, Cisco, Check Point, and F5 collectively spent $1.4B+ acquiring AI governance startups

sources.publisher: EU Artificial Intelligence Act — Official Site
sources.title: EU AI Omnibus Political Agreement — May 7, 2026
sources.claim: Political agreement on 'AI omnibus' proposal reached May 7, 2026 to simplify EU AI Act implementation for SMEs and GPAI model providers

sources.title: EU AI Act Compliance Cost Statistics 2026
sources.claim: Compliance cost for a single high-risk AI system under EU AI Act estimated at ~€52,000 annually; legal/compliance investment in GRC tools projected to grow 50% by 2026

sources.title: 10 Best AI Governance Platforms in 2026
sources.claim: 54% of IT leaders cite AI governance as a top enterprise risk priority in 2026, up from 29% two years earlier

sources.title: AI Governance Market to Reach $2.7 Billion, Globally, by 2031 at 42.1% CAGR
sources.claim: Global AI governance market valued at $80.8M in 2021, growing at 42.1% CAGR to reach $2.7B by 2031

sources.publisher: European Union — Artificial Intelligence Act Official Page
sources.title: AI Act — Shaping Europe's Digital Future
sources.claim: EU AI Act penalties: up to €35 million or 7% of global annual turnover for the most serious violations involving prohibited AI systems

sources.title: EU AI Act Timeline: Key Compliance Dates & Deadlines Explained
sources.claim: Full EU AI Act applicability August 2, 2026 (with extension to August 2, 2028 for high-risk AI systems embedded in regulated products)

sources.title: Best AI Governance Platforms 2026 — Market Overview
sources.claim: IBM WatsonX.governance, Microsoft Azure AI Foundry, Credo AI, OneTrust, and Fiddler AI identified as leading platforms; agentic AI and shadow AI emerging as primary governance challenges

unverified_claims: search_volume: ~50,000/mo estimated from market growth trajectory and enterprise priority surveys — no direct Google Trends or SEMrush source
growth_3m: +11% QoQ estimated from MarketsandMarkets 45.3% CAGR quarterly equivalent; specific Q1 2026 quarter-over-quarter data not independently verified

market_share_percentages: enterprise market share estimates for IBM, Microsoft, Google, Credo AI, OneTrust are derived from analyst mentions and enterprise deployment counts — no single source provides explicit percentage breakdowns
notes.key_event_verified: EU AI Omnibus political agreement on May 7, 2026 confirmed via artificialintelligenceact.eu official tracking site
notes.august_2_2026_deadline: 78 days from research date (May 16, 2026) — confirmed enforceable date for high-risk AI obligations under EU AI Act
